name: wendy-agentic-coding
description: Reusable Wendy CLI, wendy-agent, WendyOS, project setup, wendy.json, entitlement, app lifecycle, and device debugging workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Workflows for Wendy CLI, agent, wendy.json, and device repos.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through Wendy CLI installation, project setup, wendy.json validation and entitlements, Wendy build/run/detach/log/app lifecycle workflows, Wendy's Go CLI, gRPC agent, WendyOS, container runtime, GitHub PR, and live-device debugging workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Wendy Agentic Coding to orient on the Wendy CLI and agent code path for this task.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to install Wendy CLI and verify device discovery.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to initialize or validate this Wendy project.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to choose wendy.json entitlements for this app.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to run this app detached and stream logs.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to debug this WendyOS device runtime issue from logs to root cause.
Use Wendy Agentic Coding to prepare a Wendy PR with the right tests and review cleanup.
